steps: Go to https://app.loops.so and sign in to your account
Click 'Settings' in the left navigation sidebar
Select the 'API' tab or navigate to https://app.loops.so/settings?page=api
Copy the generated API key and store it securely
notes: Free plan available for getting started
API key is generated once — copy and store it immediately
Rate limit: 10 requests per second per team
Only one API key is active at a time — generating a new key invalidates the old one

test_endpoint.description: Test if the API key is valid — returns {"success": true} if authenticated
